items.title: Regulatory reforms under Biological Diversity (Amendment) Act, 2023 lead to surge in IPR filings
items.snippet: Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change Regulatory reforms under Biological Diversity (Amendment) Act, 2023 lead to surge in IPR filings Posted On: 01 APR 2026 8:50AM by PIB Delhi A significant increase in Intellectual Property Rights (IPR) applications linked to India’s biological resources has been recorded by the National Biodiversity Authority (NBA), reflec…

items.title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah pays tribute to Sri Sri Sri Shivakumara Swami Ji on his Jayanti
items.snippet: Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau Ministry of Home Affairs Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah pays tribute to Sri Sri Sri Shivakumara Swami Ji on his Jayanti Sri Sri Sri Shivakumara Swami Ji dedicated his entire life to compassion and education The healing touch of his divine grace has transformed countless lives Posted On: 01 APR 2026 11:09AM by PIB Delhi Union Home Minister a…

items.title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah extends greetings to the people of Odisha on Odisha Day
items.snippet: Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau Ministry of Home Affairs Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah extends greetings to the people of Odisha on Odisha Day Blessed with a rich cultural heritage and divine blessings of Prabhu Jagannath, Odisha shines as India's pride May the state touch new heights of progress and prosperity in the journey towards a Viksit Bharat Posted On: 01 APR 202…
